name: The Invasion of Area 51
developer: Avalon Games LLC, Xplor Studios LLC
publisher: Avalon Games LLC, Xplor Studios LLC
short_description: Play as the last man standing in an alternate take of the Area 51 raid where you must hold off the endless waves of civilians. You have an assault rifle, access to top-secret government weapons, and endless supplies to keep you stocked.
detailed_description:
In an alternate tale of the Area 51 raid, you play as the last man standing against a seemingly endless horde of crazed-civilians. You have an assault rifle, top-secret government weapons (like a black-hole grenade), and a helicopter to bring you supplies to stay alive. Gather points from enemy eliminations to purchase upgrades and abilities to strengthen your defense against the fearless horde.

Support for both first-person and third-person play styles.
